app-nav: padding: 52px 16px 10px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
np-label: font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 1px; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--text-secondary);
scroll-body: flex: 1; padding: 8px 16px 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; overflow: hidden;
album-art: width: 220px; height: 220px; border-radius: 6px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FF8A3D 0%, #FF5500 55%, #C23B00 100%); box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.18); margin: 8px 0 18px; position: relative; overflow: hidden;
track-title: font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.2px; color: var(--text); text-align: center;
track-artist: font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-secondary); margin: 4px 0 16px; text-align: center;
wf-playhead: position: absolute; top: 0; bottom: 14px; width: 1px; background: var(--text);
wf-avatar: position: absolute; width: 18px; height: 18px; border-radius: 50%; border: 1.5px solid var(--canvas); bottom: -2px;
wf-times: display: flex; justify-content: space-between; width: 100%; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-secondary); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; margin-bottom: 14px;
transport: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; width: 100%; padding: 0 8px;
play-btn: width: 60px; height: 60px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--orange); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(255,85,0,0.32);
action-bar: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; width: 100%; margin-top: 18px; padding: 0 4px;
act: display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500;
mini-progress: position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; height: 2px; width: 58%; background: var(--orange);
tab-bar: height: 58px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.94); backdrop-filter: saturate(180%) blur(20px); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-around; padding: 6px 8px 12px; border-top: 0.5px solid var(--divider);
tab: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 3px; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500;
